sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n100354" key="sunepoke/llw" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">συνεποκέλλω</orth>, <sense id="n100354.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">put on land together</tr_>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Plu.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.161a</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
